svg.text: EQUATION SPECTROGRAPH — The Shape of Equals
J_red = LEFT (process arriving) ◈ J_blue = RIGHT (result departing) ◈ L_dynamic = ∫J·J ds = the crossing = the equals sign
dashed = 3-pulse (femtosecond) truncation N=3 · solid = full Dirichlet N=∞ · caustic crosses ZD boundary → see past event horizon
◈ EVENT HORIZON — ZD FAULT — caustic crosses here — Laplacian sees through ◈
σ=½ · 16 prime channels p∈[2,53] · L_dynamic=∫J_red·J_blue ds · Laplacian caustic crosses event horizon
